hero.title: Leadership & Global Presence
hero.subtitle: Meet the people and the global network behind PVCON — driving pharmacovigilance excellence across 96 countries and 4 continents.

ceo.name: Moin Don
ceo.title: President & CEO, Founder
ceo.message: With over 50 years in the pharmaceutical industry, I founded PVCON to bridge the gap between regulatory expectations and operational reality in pharmacovigilance. Having served in leadership roles at Sanofi Aventis and Dr. Reddy's, and as Regional PV QA Director for Asia Pacific at Johnson & Johnson, I witnessed firsthand the need for a trusted, hands-on consulting partner that could deliver measurable improvements in drug safety operations worldwide.
ceo.message2: Today, PVCON is recognized across the industry for its rigorous approach to PV auditing, quality assurance, and corporate training. As the Lead of the South Asia Chapter for the International Society of Pharmacovigilance (ISoP) and an advisor to India's DCGI and CDSCO, our commitment to regulatory excellence and patient safety remains the foundation of everything we do — and I am proud to lead a team that shares this vision every day.
credentials: Pharma Ratan 2016 Award — Lifetime Achievement in Drug Safety & PV
Certified Lead Auditor — Trained in USA, Germany, France & Singapore
Lead, South Asia Chapter — International Society of Pharmacovigilance (ISoP)
Co-author, India's National Pharmacovigilance Program Protocol
Member, Central Advisory Committee — DIA India

globalPresence.heading: Our Global Presence
globalPresence.subtitle: From our headquarters in Mumbai, PVCON serves clients across the globe — delivering pharmacovigilance consulting, GxP audits, and regulatory support wherever our partners need us.

team.heading: The People Behind PVCON
team.subtitle: A team of seasoned pharmacovigilance professionals with decades of combined experience across global regulatory landscapes.

moin-don.name: Moin Don
moin-don.bio: 50+ years in the pharmaceutical industry. Pharmacist by education, former Regional PV QA Director at Johnson & Johnson, Asia Pacific. Certified Lead Auditor, Adjunct Professor at Jamia Hamdard University, and Lead of the South Asia Chapter for ISoP.

rameez-don.name: Rameez Don
rameez-don.bio: 15+ years of professional experience across pharmacovigilance, quality assurance, audits, training, and business development. Certified Lead Auditor, pursuing PhD in Pharmaceutical Management from IIHMR University. Member of the RQA.

nazrul-khan.name: Nazrul Khan
nazrul-khan.bio: 24+ years in pharmaceutical R&D, quality assurance, and pharmacovigilance auditing. Former MHRA Senior Pharmacovigilance Scientist and J&J Global System QA Program Manager. MSc Clinical Pharmacology, co-author of the RQA PV Auditing Handbook.

cta.heading: Ready to Work With Our Team?
cta.text: Connect with our pharmacovigilance experts and discover how PVCON can support your regulatory compliance and drug safety operations.
